title: RPC Voxel World
summary: A more complex procedural voxel world where placement, clearing, and world updates route through a local RPC command bus before mutating domain state.
prompt: Build an RPC voxel world with procedural world loading, top-of-world spawn, inventory, chunk lifecycle, build and clear commands, and an exposed RPC/domain trace.

title: Massive Voxel DSK Loop Lab
summary: Build a multi-file Three.js voxel world experiment that validates NexusRealtime domain-service boundaries through sandbox-first build loops.
prompt: Build a multi-file Three.js voxel world experiment that validates NexusRealtime domain-service boundaries through sandbox-first build loops.
